mtg_games.notes: ALWAYS EXILE FABLED PASSAGE IMMEDIATELY. kthxbai

Rich wins via infinite combo w/ Kiki Jiki (But I asked permission!) 
Turn 4 Marit Lage did nothing. (adam)
3-team 2HG. Bryan+Adam (T1) vs Jordan+Rich (T2) vs Waid+Shake (T3). Team 1 wins.

Bryan's Hermit Druid failed to find, causing bryan to perform miracles to somehow avoid death by casting from the now whole deck graveyard. Jarad and lord of extinction. Doing 90+ damage to all of us at once. wtf. holy shit. *
Bryan fucked up. He played Kratos and superpowereed Adam into having a turn with where he got 4 combats and he was able to double damage.
Tazri the ALLY Land nebie did nothing till it won.
This game ended with Bryan casting Rakdos Charm, Adam copied it with Tempt with Mayhem with then we ended up killing everyone with the subsequent copies of Rakdos Charm made.

mtg_achievementNotifyQueue.flavorText: The crawler has drawn first blood. The dungeon acknowledges your existence. Barely.
Standard was not enough. Two-Headed Giant was not enough. The crawler demanded MORE formats. The dungeon is impressed by your restlessness, if not your attention span.

The game started. The game ended. Some crawlers hadn't finished shuffling their hands. The dungeon blinked, and it was over. Efficient. Ruthless. Absolutely disgusting.
Ninety minutes. One game. The crawler has demonstrated either remarkable endurance or a fundamental misunderstanding of how combat phases work.

Three consecutive victories. The other crawlers are advised to reconsider their life choices. This one has momentum, and momentum in the dungeon is a dangerous thing.
